name: Hearty Chicken Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 Bouquet garni (4 parsley sprigs, 1/4 tsp dried thyme, 1 bay leaf, and 10 peppercorns tied in cheesecloth)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the chicken carcass, bouquet garni and garlic with 2 quarts of water. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer, covered, for 1 hour. Strain broth, refrigerate, and skim fat.
2. In another large saucepan, bring the strained broth to a boil over medium heat. Add potatoes, carrots, celery, onion, salt, marjoram, and pepper. Cook until vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes.
3. Beat milk into egg yolks in a small bowl. Gradually whisk in 1/2 cup of hot broth. Stir the mixture into the soup.
4. Add sherry, chopped cooked chicken (if using), and chopped eggs. Heat through.
5. Pour the chowder into bowls. Garnish with parsley and serve with cheese biscuits or cornbread.
6. Serves 6.
